---
title: "Presentation: `while`-loopar"
format:
  html:
    fontsize: 1em
editor: visual
---

<center>
:::{.double-v-space}
:::
<iframe src="./while-pres.html" width="800" height="550"></iframe>
</center>

## Uppgifter

Uppgifterna 1 -- 7 i dokumentet [Uppgifter Pr1, loopar](../../uppgifter/loopar/)
